testcase.name: contextLoads
testcase.error: java.lang.IllegalStateException: Failed to load ApplicationContext Caused by: org.springframework.context.ApplicationContextException: Failed to start bean 'documentationPluginsBootstrapper'; nested exception is java.lang.NullPointerException Caused by: java.lang.NullPointerException
